title: HIGH: DNS rebinding bypasses SSRF host check
description: File: server.rs, Lines: 1133-1160. is_private_host() only checks hostname strings and IP literals, not DNS-resolved addresses. An attacker domain like evil.com pointing to 127.0.0.1 or 169.254.169.254 bypasses all SSRF guards. Affects: inbox Follow handler (actor fetch), actor_cache (key fetch), media (remote image download), delivery worker (inbox delivery). Fix: add async DNS resolution check before outbound requests. Resolve hostname, verify all resolved IPs against private ranges, fail closed on DNS failure.
close_reason: Added is_private_host_resolved() with async DNS lookup. All 6 SSRF check points now resolve hostnames and verify IPs against private ranges. Fails closed on DNS failure.
